name: Persian city
hints: A merchant here has important items for sale. The compass, telescope, and stone tablet are all crucial for your voyage.
GET COMPASS - essential for navigation. GET TELESCOPE - needed for spotting land from the crow's nest. The stone tablet has mystical inscriptions.
Take all three items: GET COMPASS, GET TELESCOPE, GET TABLET. The compass is required to sail, the telescope spots islands, and the tablet reveals magic words.
READ TABLET to learn magic words. GIVE BAG (of gold) to the merchant to buy items, but he just grabs it and runs. Take items freely instead.

effects: Message: Surprised merchant grabs it and runs like a thief!

notes: Key merchant area with three essential items: compass (required for sailing), telescope (needed in crow's nest to spot land), and stone tablet (contains magic word SUN). Giving a bag of gold to the merchant causes him to grab it and run. Take items directly instead.
